risk_summary: Political and governance risk rating has increased from Moderate at project approval to Substantial at the last review, indicating worsening political instability or governance fragility affecting project implementation in Sierra Leone.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance Moderate [at Approval Package - 09 Dec 2021] ... Substantial [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 06 - 24 Dec 2024] ... Substantial [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Network Infrastructure Constraints Hindering Health System Operations
risk_summary: Network availability issues are impeding implementation of electronic data entry systems and timely health management information system (HMIS) reporting, which are critical for health service delivery monitoring and governance.
evidence_quote: New Standard Operating Procedures for electronic data entry are being rolled out in Sierra Leone and these are often hindered by network availability.
